title: The Internet Café
content: Before fast internet became common at home, Ethan often visited a small internet café near his school. The place was always filled with students, travelers, and gamers sitting in front of old computer screens for hours. Ethan usually went there to complete homework, print documents, or chat with online friends. The owner knew many customers personally and often played classic rock music through old speakers. Although the computers were slow and the chairs uncomfortable, Ethan remembers those afternoons fondly. The internet café felt more social and alive than simply using a computer alone at home. Years later, the memories still make him smile.
